task_completion.description: Create a workout routine named 'Smolov Jr. Bench'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the routine title 'Smolov Jr. Bench' displayed in the wger application interface.

task_completion.description: Create exactly 4 distinct training days within the routine
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 4 separate day sections, tabs, or headers within the 'Smolov Jr. Bench' routine overview.

task_completion.description: Configure Day 1 with Bench Press for 6 sets of 6 reps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Bench Press' exercise listed under the first day, with indicators showing 6 sets and 6 reps.

task_completion.description: Configure Day 2 with Bench Press for 7 sets of 5 reps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Bench Press' exercise listed under the second day, with indicators showing 7 sets and 5 reps.

task_completion.description: Configure Day 3 with Bench Press for 8 sets of 4 reps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Bench Press' exercise listed under the third day, with indicators showing 8 sets and 4 reps.

task_completion.description: Configure Day 4 with Bench Press for 10 sets of 3 reps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Bench Press' exercise listed under the fourth day, with indicators showing 10 sets and 3 reps.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to create the routine
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the wger web interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual wger application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show localhost and the wger application UI should be visible, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database commands to insert the routine
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands or Python scripts to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected routine name: 'Smolov Jr. Bench'. Expected days count: 4. Expected configurations for Bench Press: Day 1 (6 sets, 6 reps), Day 2 (7 sets, 5 reps), Day 3 (8 sets, 4 reps), Day 4 (10 sets, 3 reps).
